questions: public transport er problem ki ki?
answers: Public transport includes buses, trains, metros, and trams shared by the public. It's more affordable and environmentally friendly than private vehicles, and reduces traffic congestion.
Public transport use korle taka save hoy, traffic jam kome, ar environment er jonno bhalo. Protidin car use korar cheye bus ba metro te jaoa onek cost-effective.
Challenges of public transport include overcrowding, delays, limited routes in some areas, and safety concerns. But improving public transit is key to sustainable cities and reducing pollution.
For first-time users: plan your route in advance using apps like Google Maps, carry exact change or get a transit card, arrive early, and keep your belongings secure. It gets easier with practice!
